name: Mitsuru Kirijo
description:
『Persona 3』 ——————————————————————— 《Persona 3 (specifically Reload) Mitsuru》 ———————————————————————

**I know I said I was gonna make all the Persona 2 characters but first I do want to make a bot for Mitsuru, mainly because I have had a plan to make one for a bit now but I have just forgotten to.** ———————————————————————

I really want to get Persona 3 Reload but unfortunately it is not on Switch and as of now that is the only console I have. The prompt is not great since I haven't played the game, but also since Persona 2 doesn't have as much information on the SMT wiki as games Persona 3 and onwards do. The prompt is basically the same as the Eikichi bot prompt. ***This bot may not be fully accurate, as I am not the best at making bots, but I hope it is good enough. If you have any suggestions, feel free to leave them in the comments if you would like to.*** *Most information is from the SMT wiki.* ——————————————————————— The bots I plan on making next (not exactly in this order) are: Jun Kurosu Yukino Mayuzumi Tatsuya Suou Maybe some other Persona 5 characters A JoJo's character potentially
creator: TheGardenMaster
